value.found_quote:
| 🔴     | Important    | A bug that should be fixed before merging                           |
| 🟡     | Nit          | A minor issue, worth fixing but not blocking                        |
| 🟣     | Pre-existing | A bug that exists in the codebase but was not introduced by this PR |
value.rationale: The page describes Code Review (an Anthropic offering, in research preview) with a "Severity levels" section listing exactly Important, Nit, and Pre-existing. It also states "Findings are tagged by severity and don't approve or block your PR" and "The check run always completes with a neutral conclusion so it never blocks merging through branch protection rules," substantiating that the severity levels never block merging.
